yaml:
workflow:
  id: employee-onboarding
  name: Employee Onboarding
  description: |
    End-to-end onboarding: provision Okta + GitHub + Slack in parallel,
    schedule 1:1s, send welcome packet, kick off security training.
  version: "3.1.0"
  variables:
    - name: new_hire
      type: object
    - name: start_date
      type: string

  steps:
    - id: provision_accounts
      kind: parallel
      branches:
        - - id: okta
            function: apiRequest
            input:
              endpoint: /okta/users
              method: POST
              body:
                profile:
                  email: $new_hire.email
                  firstName: $new_hire.first_name
                  lastName: $new_hire.last_name
                  department: $new_hire.department
            output: okta_user
        - - id: github
            function: apiRequest
            input:
              endpoint: /github/orgs/acme/invitations
              method: POST
              body:
                email: $new_hire.email
                team_ids: $new_hire.github_teams
        - - id: slack
            function: apiRequest
            input:
              endpoint: https://slack.com/api/admin.users.invite
              method: POST
              body:
                email: $new_hire.email
                channels: $new_hire.default_channels
        - - id: laptop
            function: createTask
            input:
              queue: it_provisioning
              content:
                hire: $new_hire
                ship_by: $start_date

    - id: schedule_welcome_1on1s
      kind: for_each
      iterable: $new_hire.team_members
      item: peer
      body:
        - id: book_30min
          function: apiRequest
          input:
            endpoint: /calendar/book
            method: POST
            body:
              attendees:
                - $new_hire.email
                - $peer.email
              duration: 30
              title: "Welcome 1:1 — $new_hire.first_name & $peer.first_name"
              within_days: 14

    - id: send_welcome_packet
      function: apiRequest
      input:
        endpoint: /email/send
        method: POST
        body:
          to: $new_hire.email
          template: welcome_packet
          vars:
            buddy: $new_hire.buddy.email
            first_day_agenda: $new_hire.first_day_agenda

    - id: kickoff_training
      function: apiRequest
      input:
        endpoint: /training/enroll
        method: POST
        body:
          user: $new_hire.email
          courses:
            - security_basics
            - data_handling
            - tools_overview
